summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bloom trans community app v2 - All major features working correctly: auth redirect, registration with secret code + new fields, login, forgot password, community highlights, avatars, navigation with Czech diacritics, Specialists page with category chips/region filter, News page with all 6 category tabs, Support page with filters, Profile page with all editable fields, Admin page with access control.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check - 26/26 tests passed
Backend: Registration with wrong secret code correctly rejected
Backend: Registration with correct secret code 'Transfortrans' and new fields (phone, bio, district) works
Backend: Login works for test users
Backend: Password reset request endpoint works (MOCKED)
Backend: User rating endpoint POST /api/users/{id}/rate works
Backend: Self-rating correctly prevented
Backend: GET /api/users/{id}/ratings works
Backend: GET /api/users/{id}/profile returns user with badges
Backend: GET /api/messages/unread-count works
Backend: GET /api/notifications works
Backend: GET /api/community/highlights returns new_members, active_helpers, top_specialists
Backend: Admin setup with wrong secret correctly rejected
Backend: Non-admin users cannot access /api/admin/users
Backend: Specialists filter by region works
Backend: News category filters (world, local, tips, events, interviews) work
Frontend: Non-authenticated users redirected to /auth
Frontend: Lotus logo present on auth page
Frontend: Login and Register tabs present
Frontend: 'Zapomněli jste heslo?' link exists with Czech diacritics
Frontend: Secret code (community password) field exists on registration
Frontend: Phone field exists on registration form
Frontend: Bio field exists on registration form
Frontend: 12 avatar buttons render correctly (inline SVG with pastel colors)
Frontend: Registration with wrong secret code shows error 'Nesprávný tajný kód pro registraci'
Frontend: Login redirects to homepage
Frontend: Homepage shows welcome message 'Vítejte zpět, {username}'
Frontend: Navigation shows all sections with Czech labels (Domů, Vzájemná podpora, Trans-friendly odborníci, Právní poradna, Aktuality, V mém okolí)
Frontend: Messages link in navigation present
Frontend: Community section on homepage with 'Noví členové komunity', 'Nejaktivnější pomocníci', 'Nejlépe hodnocení odborníci'
Frontend: Specialists page has 6 specialty category buttons
Frontend: Specialists page has region filter 'Celá ČR'
Frontend: News page has 6 category tabs (Vše, Ze světa, Domácí, Tipy a triky, Eventy, Rozhovory)
Frontend: Support page has location filter
Frontend: Support page has type filter
Frontend: Profile page has username, phone, bio fields
Frontend: Profile page has 12 avatar selection buttons
Frontend: Admin page shows 'Přístup odepřen' for non-admin users with setup instructions
Frontend: Forgot password form ('Obnovení hesla') works and shows success message
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during registration testing with random suffixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Test user credentials: test1@bloom.cz / test123 or newtest@bloom.cz / test123. Secret registration code: Transfortrans. Admin setup: POST /api/admin/setup-first-admin with email and secret='bloom-admin-2024'. App uses Czech language with proper diacritics. Authentication required for all routes except /auth. Community highlights on homepage. Avatars are inline SVGs with pastel colors.

mocked_apis.password_reset: POST /api/auth/reset-password-request - returns success message but no actual email is sent (SMTP not configured)
